mapper.sql: w.id, w.outsource_task_id, w.man_days, w.site_count, w.device_count, w.submitted_by, w.confirmed_by, w.status, w.remark, w.create_by, w.create_time, w.update_by, w.update_time, ot.project_id, ot.agent_company_id, p.project_name, ac.company_name AS agent_company_name, u.real_name AS confirm_by_name

LEFT JOIN outsource_task ot ON ot.id = w.outsource_task_id AND ot.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = ot.project_id AND p.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN agent_company ac ON ac.id = ot.agent_company_id AND ac.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = w.confirmed_by AND u.deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM outsource_workload w
WHERE w.outsource_task_id = #{taskId} AND w.deleted = 0 ORDER BY w.create_time DESC
